name: edp-ocorrencia-automation
description: Automação de preenchimento de ocorrências SGS - EDP

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const dist='dist'; fs.rmSync(dist,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.mkdirSync(dist,{recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('src', dist, {recursive:true}); console.log('Build completo!');"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx netlify deploy --prod --dir=dist
scripts.deploy:draft: npm run build && npx netlify deploy --dir=dist
